landing.heroDescription: Create a beautiful wedding website your guests will remember. No design skills needed.
landing.howItWorksSubtitle: Three simple steps to your perfect wedding website
landing.step1Desc: Enter your names, wedding date, and venue. It takes less than a minute.
landing.step2Desc: Pick a template and color palette that matches your wedding aesthetic.
landing.step3Desc: Get a beautiful link and QR code to share with your guests instantly.
landing.chooseStyleSubtitle: Elegant templates designed for every couple
landing.everythingYouNeedSubtitle: All the features to make your wedding website perfect
landing.featureQrDesc: Share your wedding website with a beautiful QR code for your invitations.
landing.featureRsvpDesc: Collect RSVPs, menu choices, and dietary requirements in one place.
landing.featurePhotoDesc: Showcase your engagement photos and share memories with guests.
landing.featureCountdownDesc: Build excitement with a live countdown to your special day.
landing.featureProgramDesc: Share the schedule so guests know exactly what to expect.
landing.featureMenuDesc: Let guests choose their dishes and note dietary requirements or allergies.
landing.simplePricingSubtitle: Preview for free, publish when you're ready
landing.noSubscriptions: No subscriptions. No hidden fees. Yours forever.
landing.pricingFeature1: Custom wedding website with your chosen template
landing.pricingFeature7: Shareable link and QR code included

create.namesDateSubtitle: Tell us about your big day

create.photoGallerySubtitle: Upload photos of your story together (max 10)
create.photoGalleryDraftNotice: Photos are only visible to you. They will be published with your website once the process is complete.
create.photoCaption: Text below the photo (e.g. Our first trip)
create.noProgramEntries: No entries yet. Click "Add Entry" to build your program.
create.previewPublishSubtitle: Your wedding website is ready! Scroll through the preview below.
create.websiteLanguageHelp: The language your guests will see on your wedding website

suggestions.title: Suggestions
suggestions.subtitle: Help us improve Wedding30s. Tell us what feature you'd like to see and we'll do our best to make it happen.
suggestions.description: What would you like us to add?
suggestions.descriptionPlaceholder: Describe the feature you're missing, the more detail the better...
suggestions.linksPlaceholder: If you've seen something similar elsewhere, paste the links here...
suggestions.confirmationMessage: We've received your suggestion. We'll send you an email with more details soon.

legal.legal1p1: In compliance with Article 10 of Spanish Law 34/2002 on Information Society Services and Electronic Commerce (LSSI-CE), the following information about the website owner is provided:
legal.legal2p1: Wedding30s is a wedding website creation service that allows users to design, customize, and publish a website for their event. The service is provided by BARTINSOFT SL through the wedding30s.com platform.
legal.legal3p1: The website content (design, source code, templates, logos, text, and graphics) is the property of BARTINSOFT SL or its licensors. Reproduction, distribution, or modification without express authorization is prohibited.
legal.legal3p2: Content created by users (text, photographs, wedding details) remains the property of the users themselves. BARTINSOFT SL only stores and processes such content to provide the contracted service.
legal.legal4p1: The user agrees to use the website in accordance with applicable law, this legal notice, and accepted standards of conduct. The user shall not use the service for unlawful purposes or in any way that may harm the rights of third parties.
legal.legal5p1: BARTINSOFT SL shall not be liable for damages arising from use of the service that are beyond its control, including errors or omissions in user-provided content, service interruptions due to force majeure, or actions by third parties.
legal.legal6p1: These terms are governed by Spanish law. Any disputes shall be submitted to the courts of Madrid, Spain, unless applicable regulations provide otherwise.
legal.privacy2p1: We collect the following personal data:
legal.privacy2item1: Account data (optional): name, email, encrypted password, or Google identifier if you use Google sign-in.
legal.privacy2item2: Wedding data: couple's names, date, location, venue, story, menu, program, photographs.
legal.privacy2item3: Guest data (RSVP): name, email (optional), menu selection, allergies, message.
legal.privacy2item4: Suggestion data: email and description of the submitted suggestion.
legal.privacy3p1: We process data for the following purposes:
legal.privacy3item1: Create and publish the wedding website.
legal.privacy3item2: Manage guest RSVPs and attendance confirmations.
legal.privacy3item4: Process payment through Polar.sh (Merchant of Record).
legal.privacy4item1: Performance of contract: processing is necessary to provide the contracted service.
legal.privacy4item2: Legitimate interest: service improvement and operational communications.
legal.privacy4item3: Consent: for submitting suggestions and creating an account.
legal.privacy5item1: Polar.sh: payment processor (Merchant of Record). Handles the financial transaction and invoicing to the end customer.
legal.privacy5item2: Amazon Web Services (AWS): image hosting on S3 and transactional email delivery via SES. Servers located in the eu-west-3 (Paris) region.
legal.privacy5item3: Google: if the user signs in with Google, we receive the email and name from the Google profile.
legal.privacy5p2: We do not sell or share personal data with third parties for advertising purposes.
legal.privacy6p1: Some providers (AWS, Cloudflare, Google, Polar) may process data outside the EEA. In all cases, transfers are carried out with appropriate safeguards (Standard Contractual Clauses, Adequacy Decisions, or equivalent mechanisms).
legal.privacy7item1: Wedding and RSVP data: retained while the service is active. Unpaid drafts are automatically deleted after 7 days.
legal.privacy7item2: Account data: retained while the account is active.
legal.privacy7item3: Payment data: managed and retained by Polar.sh according to their policy.
legal.privacy8p1: You may exercise your rights of access, rectification, erasure, objection, restriction, and data portability under the GDPR by emailing support{'@'}wedding30s.com with your name and the right you wish to exercise.
legal.privacy8p2: You also have the right to lodge a complaint with the Spanish Data Protection Authority (AEPD) at www.aepd.es.
legal.privacy9item1: token (session cookie): a strictly necessary httpOnly cookie to maintain the authenticated user session. Duration: 7 days. No consent required as it is strictly necessary.
legal.privacy9item2: Cloudflare Turnstile: technical cookies for anti-bot verification on forms. Managed by Cloudflare.
legal.privacy9p2: We do not use analytics, advertising, or third-party tracking cookies.
legal.privacy10p1: We implement appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect your data: password hashing with bcrypt, HTTPS connections, JWT tokens in httpOnly cookies, and secure storage on AWS.
legal.terms1p1: Wedding30s is a wedding website creation service operated by BARTINSOFT SL. Users can design and preview their wedding website for free. Publishing the website requires a one-time payment of EUR 49.
legal.terms2p1: Payment is processed through Polar.sh, which acts as Merchant of Record. Polar.sh is the legal seller of the transaction and is responsible for:
legal.terms2item2: Handling VAT and applicable taxes based on the buyer's country.
legal.terms2item3: Issuing the invoice to the end customer.
legal.terms2p2: BARTINSOFT SL receives the net amount as the service provider.
legal.terms3p1: In accordance with Article 103(a) of Spanish Royal Legislative Decree 1/2007, the right of withdrawal does not apply to digital content supplied on a non-tangible medium where performance has begun with the consumer's prior consent. By completing payment and publishing the website, the user consents to the immediate provision of the service.
legal.terms3p2: However, if you are not satisfied with the service, you may contact support{'@'}wedding30s.com and we will evaluate your case.
legal.terms4item1: The user creates and configures their wedding website through the online editor.
legal.terms4item2: Preview and preview link are free of charge.
legal.terms4item3: After payment, the website is published at a public URL (wedding30s.com/[slug]).
legal.terms4item4: Guests can access the website, view wedding details, and confirm their attendance (RSVP).
legal.terms4item5: The user may edit the website after it is published.
legal.terms5p1: Account creation is optional and offered after payment. An account allows the user to manage their weddings from any device. The user is responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of their credentials.
legal.terms6p1: The user is solely responsible for all content uploaded to the platform (text, photographs, data). The user warrants that they hold the necessary rights to such content and that it does not infringe on third-party rights.
legal.terms6p2: BARTINSOFT SL reserves the right to remove content that is unlawful, offensive, or in breach of these terms.
legal.terms7p1: BARTINSOFT SL will make reasonable efforts to keep the service available. However, we do not guarantee uninterrupted availability and shall not be liable for temporary interruptions due to maintenance, updates, or force majeure.
legal.terms8p1: BARTINSOFT SL's maximum liability shall be limited to the amount paid by the user (EUR 49). BARTINSOFT SL shall not be liable for indirect damages, loss of user data due to causes beyond its control, or any use that guests make of information published on the website.
legal.terms9p1: BARTINSOFT SL may modify these terms at any time. Changes will be posted on this page. Continued use of the service after changes are published constitutes acceptance of the new terms.
legal.terms10p1: These terms are governed by Spanish law. Any disputes shall be submitted to the courts of Madrid, Spain, without prejudice to any rights the consumer may have under applicable regulations.
legal.terms11p1: For any questions about these terms, please email support{'@'}wedding30s.com.
